code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut last = ""
mut found = false
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 10
    if not string.is_empty(string.trim(current))
      last = current
      found = true
    end
    current = ""
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(string.trim(current))
  last = current
  found = true
end

if found
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
